item.title: Wholesale Washed Cotton Tee | Vintage Print Premium Basic
item.description: 100% cotton jersey, garment-washed for ultra-soft, lived-in handfeel. Relaxed fit with minimalist vintage print. A timeless basic for daily wear and capsule wardrobes.
